title: Loot Urns
description: Adds data driven urns to the world
body:
Fabric mod that adds data driven loot urns. Requires **Fabric API**.  
The original inspiration for this was a distinct lack of cool riches-dropping urns  
that don't use the god-awful glass break sound in my life.

By default those urns spawn in **jungle temples**, **desert temples** and **mineshafts** (that can be disabled in the config), but the idea behind this mod is mainly that other mods can add them to their own structures.  
List of mods that currently do exactly that:
- Stylish Occult

![Urns](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/boP1PmxA/images/ccabf1b1a7a8be36c6208e2fc3ead408142cb831.png)
